data.title: Law of Clarity
data.description: WhatsApp's interface is straightforward and easy to navigate.

data.title: Law of Context
data.description: Features are organized based on user preferences and history.
data.technical_spec: Adaptive UI that learns from user behavior.

data.title: Law of Cognitive Load
data.description: Effort is made to reduce the cognitive load on users.
data.technical_spec: Simplified onboarding process and minimal number of steps to perform core functions.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Design prioritizes accessibility and ease of use.
data.technical_spec: Larger, easy-to-tap buttons for frequent actions.

data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Choices are presented in a way that minimizes decision time.
data.technical_spec: Quick replies and suggestions to aid decision making.
